<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/validator_operator/validator_onboarding.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-validator-operator-validator-onboarding-parsed-literal-126" location="lines:126-130" -->
```bash
(set -o pipefail
for url in $(curl -fsS -m 5 --connect-timeout 5 |gsf_scan_url|/api/scan/v0/dso-sequencers | jq -r '.domainSequencers[].sequencers[].url | sub("https://"; "")'); do
  echo -n "$url: "
  grpcurl --max-time 10 "$url":443 grpc.health.v1.Health/Check
done)
```
